ValidationRule.description: Validates that the Employer Postal Code is in the correct format
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: If( ISNEW(), (AND(OR(ISNULL( CreatedDate ),ISBLANK(CreatedDate )),IF( ISBLANK(Debtor_1_Employer_Postal_Code__c), false, AND(Created_By_Doc_Parser__c = false, NOT(REGEX(Debtor_1_Employer_Postal_Code__c, "((?i)[ABCEGHJKLMNPRSTVXY]\\d[A-Z]?\\s?\\d[A-Z]\\d)?"))) ))), IF( ISBLANK(Debtor_1_Employer_Postal_Code__c), false, AND(Created_By_Doc_Parser__c = false, NOT(REGEX(Debtor_1_Employer_Postal_Code__c, "((?i)[ABCEGHJKLMNPRSTVXY]\\d[A-Z]?\\s?\\d[A-Z]\\d)?"))) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide a valid postal code
